hero.title: Unlimited Invoices & Tax Under Control.
hero.subtitle: The only app with {visaShield} that locks your hours at 48h/fortnight. Send unlimited invoices, snap receipts for expenses and know exactly how much tax to pay for just {price}.

audience.title: Built by immigrants for the daily grind:

features.title: Everything an immigrant needs,
features.subtitle: Stop juggling 4 different apps. Ozly handles invoices, tax, expenses and visa compliance in one place.
features.visaShieldDesc: Protects your Student Visa. Tracks your hours and alerts you before you breach the 48h/fortnight limit.
features.invoicesDesc: No limits. Generate professional invoices and send them straight to your client's WhatsApp.
features.ocrDesc: Snap a photo of your receipt and deduct it from tax. No typing — AI extracts everything for you.
features.offlineDesc: Works on the go, on the bus, no wifi needed. Syncs when you're back online.

comparison.title: Ozly vs
comparison.subtitle: Other apps limit PDFs, charge a % of your earnings and ignore your visa rules.

pricing.title: One price. Everything included.
pricing.subtitle: No surprises, no per-invoice fee, no percentage of your earnings.

faq.pageSubtitle: Find answers to common questions about Ozly. Can't find what you need? Get in touch.
faq.contactSubtitle: Send us an email and we'll get back to you quickly.
faq.a1: Ozly is an app built especially for immigrants in Australia working as Sole Traders with an ABN. It combines unlimited invoices, expense tracking with OCR, tax estimation and Visa Shield all in one place.
faq.a2: Visa Shield monitors your work hours and alerts you before you breach the 48-hour per fortnight limit on your student visa. Work with peace of mind without risking your visa conditions.
faq.a3: $15 AUD per month, flat price. No invoice limits, no percentage of your earnings, no surprises.
faq.a4: Yes! Ozly works 100% offline. You can create invoices, log expenses and track your hours without wifi. Everything syncs automatically when you're back online.
faq.a5: Just take a photo of your receipt. Ozly's AI automatically extracts the amount, date and description. Confirm it and the expense is logged for tax deduction.
faq.q6: Does the app calculate my tax?
faq.a6: Yes. Ozly estimates how much tax you'll owe following ATO (Australian Taxation Office) rules. No surprises at tax return time.
faq.q7: Can I send invoices via WhatsApp?
faq.a7: Yes! After generating the PDF invoice, you can share it directly via WhatsApp, email or any other app on your phone.
faq.q8: Is Ozly available in other languages?
faq.a8: Yes! Ozly is available in Portuguese, English and Spanish, both in the app and on the website.
faq.q9: How do I cancel my subscription?
faq.a9: You can cancel anytime directly through the App Store or Google Play. No hassle, no cancellation fee.
faq.a10: Yes. Your data is encrypted and stored securely. We don't share your information with third parties.
